description: This structured shoe from arrow for men has a slim silhouette. The interesting cutouts referencing the classic Scottish brogue on this wingtip styled low-top pair, refines your formal ensemble. With slick suiting or toned-down shirt and trousers, these shoes crafted from pure leather add a definite panache to your ensemble. Upper Genuine leather upper with wingtip overlay on the toe box and heel collar Brogue style perforations on the toe box for breathability Brand button on the lateral side of the heel Central lace up system Soft sockliner for instep comfort Leather lining Padded tongue Midsole Shock absorbing EVA midsole Outsole TPR outsole with heel Metaalic toned textured grooves on the midfoot for grip and traction Wash care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth Do not machine wash
